glue.trigger.condition.CfnAbout: Defines a condition under which a trigger fires.

glue.trigger.condition.CrawlerName.Description: The name of the crawler to which this condition applies.

glue.trigger.condition.CrawlState.Description: The state of the crawler to which this condition applies.

glue.trigger.condition.JobName.Description: The name of the job whose `JobRuns` this condition applies to, and on which this trigger waits.

glue.trigger.condition.State.Description: The condition state. Currently, the values supported are `SUCCEEDED`, `STOPPED`, `TIMEOUT`, and `FAILED`.
glue.trigger.condition.State.Allowed values: ERROR | FAILED | RUNNING | STARTING | STOPPED | STOPPING | SUCCEEDED | TIMEOUT | WAITING
